name: Shea Butter
description: A rich plant lipid extracted from the nuts of the shea tree, packed with vitamins A, E, and F.
scientificSummary: Creates a protective barrier on the skin's surface, sealing in moisture and delivering healing fatty acids.
mechanismOfAction: Creates a protective barrier on the skin's surface, sealing in moisture and delivering healing fatty acids.
